examTitle: Hobbies & Leisure CEFR B2 Mock Reading & Use of English Exam

parts.title: Part 1: Multiple-Choice Cloze on Hobbies
parts.content: The rise of social media has transformed the way we live our lives. We can now connect with friends and family from across the globe, share our thoughts and experiences, and discover new hobbies. For some people, the allure of social media is irresistible. They spend hours scrolling through their feeds, liking and sharing posts, and getting caught up in online trends. But for others, the constant stream of information can be overwhelming. They may feel anxious or stressed about keeping up with the latest news and updates. As a result, some people have turned to hobbies that help them disconnect from the digital world. (1) _______ (ENJOY) activities such as hiking, gardening, or painting can be a great way to relax and unwind. These hobbies allow people to focus on the present moment and tap into their creativity. They can also provide a sense of accomplishment and pride in one's work. For example, someone who has been working on a painting for weeks may (2) _______ (FEEL) a sense of satisfaction when it is finally complete. Similarly, someone who has spent hours in the garden may (3) _______ (ENJOY) the fruits of their labor when they see their plants blooming. As people continue to navigate the complexities of social media, it's (4) _______ (IMPORTANT) to make time for hobbies that bring us joy and help us disconnect from the digital world. (5) _______ (ENJOY) these activities can have a positive impact on our mental and physical health. By setting aside time for hobbies, we can reduce stress and anxiety, improve our mood, and increase our sense of well-being. (6) _______ (DISCOVER) new hobbies can also be a great way to meet new people and make friends. For instance, someone who joins a book club may (7) _______ (MEET) fellow book lovers and engage in meaningful conversations about literature.
options: A. engage in
B. participate in
C. take part in
D. get involved in
parts.instructions: Read the text below and decide which answer best fits each gap.

questions.question: Gap 1
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'engage in' because it is the most natural choice to complete the sentence. The other options, while grammatically correct, do not fit as well in the context of the sentence. For example, 'participate in' implies a more active role, whereas 'engage in' suggests a more casual involvement. 'Take part in' is a bit more formal than 'engage in', and 'get involved in' is a bit more dramatic.
questions.tips: When completing multiple-choice cloze tasks, try to read the text carefully and identify the most natural choice for each gap. Pay attention to the context and the tone of the sentence, and choose the option that best fits the meaning.

questions.question: Gap 2
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'feel' because it is the most natural choice to complete the sentence. The other options, while grammatically correct, do not fit as well in the context of the sentence. For example, 'think' implies a more intellectual response, whereas 'feel' suggests a more emotional response.

parts.title: Part 2: Open Cloze on Leisure Activities
parts.content: Many people enjoy (1) _______ in their free time. Some like to (2) _______ in the park, while others prefer to (3) _______ at home. For those who enjoy (4) _______ activities, there are many options available. You can (5) _______ in a swimming pool, (6) _______ on a beach, or even (7) _______ in a forest.

parts.title: Part 3: Word Formation on Hobbies
parts.content: The town has seen a significant (1) _______ (IMPROVE) in public services. The local council has invested in new infrastructure, including a state-of-the-art library and a modern sports center. As a result, the town has become a popular destination for (2) _______ (ATTEND) cultural events. The library is now a hub for book lovers, with regular readings and workshops. The sports center is a favorite among local residents, who enjoy (3) _______ (PARTICIPATE) in various sports and activities. In addition, the town has also seen a rise in (4) _______ (PRACTICE) yoga and meditation classes. These classes are popular among both locals and tourists, who come to the town to (5) _______ (IMPROVE) their mental and physical well-being. The town's vibrant atmosphere and range of activities make it an ideal destination for (6) _______ (ENJOY) a relaxing break. With its beautiful scenery and friendly residents, the town is a perfect place to (7) _______ (RELAX) and unwind.
parts.instructions: Read the text below. Use the word given in capitals at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line.

questions.question: IMPROVE
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'improvement' because it is the word formed by adding the suffix '-ment' to the base word 'improve'.
questions.tips: When completing word formation tasks, try to identify the base word and the required suffix. Use this information to form the correct word.

questions.question: ATTEND
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'attendances' because it is the word formed by adding the suffix '-ance' to the base word 'attend'.
questions.tips: When completing word formation tasks, try to identify the base word and the required suffix. Use this information to form the correct word.

questions.question: PARTICIPATE
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'participation' because it is the word formed by adding the suffix '-ation' to the base word 'participate'.
questions.tips: When completing word formation tasks, try to identify the base word and the required suffix. Use this information to form the correct word.

questions.question: PRACTICE
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'practices' because it is the word formed by adding the suffix '-es' to the base word 'practice'.
questions.tips: When completing word formation tasks, try to identify the base word and the required suffix. Use this information to form the correct word.

questions.question: IMPROVE
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'improving' because it is the word formed by adding the suffix '-ing' to the base word 'improve'.
questions.tips: When completing word formation tasks, try to identify the base word and the required suffix. Use this information to form the correct word.

questions.question: ENJOY
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'enjoyment' because it is the word formed by adding the suffix '-ment' to the base word 'enjoy'.
questions.tips: When completing word formation tasks, try to identify the base word and the required suffix. Use this information to form the correct word.

questions.question: RELAX
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'relaxation' because it is the word formed by adding the suffix '-ation' to the base word 'relax'.
questions.tips: When completing word formation tasks, try to identify the base word and the required suffix. Use this information to form the correct word.

parts.title: Part 4: Key Word Transformations on Leisure
parts.content: The town has a rich cultural scene. It has (1) _______ (HAVE) several museums and art galleries. Visitors can explore the town's history and culture by (2) _______ (VISIT) these institutions. The town's cultural events are also popular among locals and tourists. They (3) _______ (ATTEND) concerts, plays, and festivals throughout the year. The town's parks and gardens are another attraction. They (4) _______ (MAINTAIN) beautiful and peaceful environments. The town's residents are proud of their cultural heritage and (5) _______ (PRESERVE) it for future generations.
parts.instructions: Complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given.

questions.question: HAVE
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'has had' because it is the correct transformation of the given word 'have'. The word 'have' is in the present tense, but the sentence requires a past tense verb. The correct transformation is 'has had' because it implies that the museums and art galleries have been existing for a certain period.
questions.tips: When completing key word transformations, try to analyze the sentence and identify the correct transformation of the given word. Use this information to form the correct sentence.

questions.question: VISIT
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'visit' because it is the correct transformation of the given word 'visit'. The word 'visit' is a verb, and the sentence requires a verb in the present tense. The correct transformation is 'visit' because it implies that the institutions are open to visitors.
questions.tips: When completing key word transformations, try to analyze the sentence and identify the correct transformation of the given word. Use this information to form the correct sentence.

questions.question: ATTEND
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'attend' because it is the correct transformation of the given word 'attend'. The word 'attend' is a verb, and the sentence requires a verb in the present tense. The correct transformation is 'attend' because it implies that the concerts, plays, and festivals are happening throughout the year.
questions.tips: When completing key word transformations, try to analyze the sentence and identify the correct transformation of the given word. Use this information to form the correct sentence.

questions.question: MAINTAIN
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'maintain' because it is the correct transformation of the given word 'maintain'. The word 'maintain' is a verb, and the sentence requires a verb in the present tense. The correct transformation is 'maintain' because it implies that the parks and gardens are kept in a beautiful and peaceful state.
questions.tips: When completing key word transformations, try to analyze the sentence and identify the correct transformation of the given word. Use this information to form the correct sentence.

questions.question: PRESERVE
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'preserve' because it is the correct transformation of the given word 'preserve'. The word 'preserve' is a verb, and the sentence requires a verb in the present tense. The correct transformation is 'preserve' because it implies that the town's residents are taking steps to protect the cultural heritage.
questions.tips: When completing key word transformations, try to analyze the sentence and identify the correct transformation of the given word. Use this information to form the correct sentence.

parts.title: Part 5: Multiple-Choice Reading Comprehension on Leisure
parts.content: The importance of leisure time cannot be overstated. Leisure activities provide a much-needed break from the stresses of daily life. According to a recent study, people who engage in regular leisure activities are (1) _______ (REDUCE) their risk of developing mental health problems. The study found that people who spend more time engaging in leisure activities tend to have lower levels of stress and anxiety. In addition, leisure activities have been shown to have a positive impact on physical health. People who (2) _______ (ENGAGE) in regular exercise and physical activity are less likely to develop chronic diseases such as heart disease and diabetes. Furthermore, leisure activities provide an opportunity for social interaction and (3) _______ (BUILD) relationships with others. This is particularly important for older adults, who may be at risk of (4) _______ (SUFFER) from loneliness and social isolation. The benefits of leisure activities are clear: they have a positive impact on both physical and mental health, and provide an opportunity for social interaction.
options: A. are likely to
B. tend to
C. have a greater risk of
D. are less likely to
parts.instructions: Read the text and answer the questions. For each question, choose the correct answer A, B, C or D.

questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'D' because it is the most natural choice to complete the sentence. The sentence states that people who engage in regular leisure activities are less likely to develop mental health problems, which is a positive outcome.
questions.tips: When completing multiple-choice reading comprehension tasks, try to read the text carefully and identify the correct answer. Pay attention to the context and the tone of the sentence, and choose the option that best fits the meaning.

questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'D' because it is the most natural choice to complete the sentence. The sentence states that people who engage in regular exercise and physical activity are less likely to develop chronic diseases, which is a positive outcome.
questions.tips: When completing multiple-choice reading comprehension tasks, try to read the text carefully and identify the correct answer. Pay attention to the context and the tone of the sentence, and choose the option that best fits the meaning.

questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'D' because it is the most natural choice to complete the sentence. The sentence states that people who engage in regular leisure activities provide an opportunity for social interaction and build relationships with others, which is a positive outcome.
questions.tips: When completing multiple-choice reading comprehension tasks, try to read the text carefully and identify the correct answer. Pay attention to the context and the tone of the sentence, and choose the option that best fits the meaning.

questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'D' because it is the most natural choice to complete the sentence. The sentence states that older adults who are at risk of loneliness and social isolation may suffer from these conditions, which is a negative outcome.
questions.tips: When completing multiple-choice reading comprehension tasks, try to read the text carefully and identify the correct answer. Pay attention to the context and the tone of the sentence, and choose the option that best fits the meaning.

parts.title: Part 6: Gapped Text on Leisure
parts.content: Leisure activities are an essential part of our lives. They [Gap 1] _______ (PROVIDE) us with a much-needed break from the stresses of daily life. When we engage in leisure activities, we [Gap 2] _______ (FEEL) more relaxed and refreshed. This is because leisure activities allow us to [Gap 3] _______ (ENJOY) ourselves in a way that is not possible in our daily lives. For example, when we go on vacation, we [Gap 4] _______ (ENJOY) the beautiful scenery and try new things. When we participate in sports, we [Gap 5] _______ (ENJOY) the thrill of competition and the sense of achievement. Leisure activities also provide us with an opportunity to [Gap 6] _______ (MEET) new people and make friends. This is particularly important for older adults, who may be at risk of [Gap 7] _______ (SUFFER) from loneliness and social isolation.
options: A. provide us with a much-needed break from the stresses of daily life.
B. make us feel more relaxed and refreshed.
C. allow us to enjoy ourselves in a way that is not possible in our daily lives.
D. make us feel more anxious and stressed.
E. provide us with an opportunity to meet new people and make friends.
F. make us feel more isolated and alone.
G. suffer from loneliness and social isolation.
parts.instructions: Six sentences have been removed from the text. Choose from the sentences A-G the one which fits each gap. There is one extra sentence which you do not need to use.

questions.question: Gap 1
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'A' because it is the sentence that fits the context of the text. The sentence states that leisure activities provide us with a much-needed break from the stresses of daily life.

questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'A' because it is the sentence that fits the context of the text. The sentence states that when we go on vacation, we enjoy the beautiful scenery and try new things.
questions.tips: When completing gapped text tasks, try to read the text carefully and identify the correct sentence for each gap. Pay attention to the context and the tone of the sentence, and choose the option that best fits the meaning.

questions.tips: When completing gapped text tasks, try to read the text carefully and identify the correct sentence for each gap. Pay attention to the context and the tone of the sentence, and choose the option that best fits the meaning.

parts.title: Part 7: Multiple Matching on Leisure
parts.content: A. Leisure activities provide a much-needed break from the stresses of daily life. B. Regular exercise and physical activity can reduce the risk of chronic diseases. C. Social interaction is essential for our mental and emotional well-being. D. Older adults who are at risk of loneliness and social isolation may suffer from these conditions. E. Leisure activities allow us to enjoy ourselves in a way that is not possible in our daily lives. F. Participating in sports can improve our physical health and reduce stress. G. Engaging in hobbies can improve our mental health and reduce anxiety.
options: A. Leisure activities provide a much-needed break from the stresses of daily life.
B. Regular exercise and physical activity can reduce the risk of chronic diseases.
C. Social interaction is essential for our mental and emotional well-being.
D. Older adults who are at risk of loneliness and social isolation may suffer from these conditions.
E. Leisure activities allow us to enjoy ourselves in a way that is not possible in our daily lives.
F. Participating in sports can improve our physical health and reduce stress.
G. Engaging in hobbies can improve our mental health and reduce anxiety.
